global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text and shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to explore trending content and take action.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending' is prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text saying 'Start free today' appears just below the main headline.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Book now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The 'PulsePlay' logo is positioned at the top left, featuring a simple and modern design.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is located near the top, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping circular shapes in lighter shades of purple are placed in the center for visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: An additional oval shape in a lighter hue is positioned centrally, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Smaller circular element
elements.description: A small circle in a lighter shade is placed within the main content area, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: Another oval shape in a lighter color is included, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned towards the bottom left, adding detail to the layout.

elements.label: Another small element
elements.description: A similar small decorative element located near the previous one, maintaining consistency.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: The main content area is defined by the arrangement of text and shapes, creating a cohesive look.

elements.label: Top left logo
elements.description: The 'PulsePlay' logo is clearly visible at the top left corner, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: The 'UGC' tag is small and positioned near the top, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and vibrant, trending content, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is centrally located.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Start free today, Book now, PulsePlay, UGC
